colors.name: Gradient/skeuemorphic-gradient-border
colors.description: Used to create a subtle skeuemorphic effect in components such as primary buttons. This can be removed or replaced with a 1px stroke if you prefer a flat style.

effects.name: Shadows/shadow-xs
effects.description: Shadows allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.name: Shadows/shadow-xs-skeuomorphic
effects.description:
Used to create a subtle skeuomorphic effect in components such as buttons and tabs.

This can be removed or replaced with shadow-xs if you prefer a flat style.

effects.name: Shadows/shadow-sm
effects.description: Shadows allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.name: Shadows/shadow-md
effects.description: Shadows allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.name: Shadows/shadow-lg
effects.description: Shadows allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.name: Shadows/shadow-xl
effects.description: Shadows allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.name: Shadows/shadow-2xl
effects.description: Shadows allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.name: Shadows/shadow-3xl
effects.description: Shadows allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.name: Shadows/Portfolio mockups/shadow-main-centre-md
effects.description: Used for portfolio mockup layouts.

effects.name: Shadows/Portfolio mockups/shadow-main-centre-lg
effects.description: Used for portfolio mockup layouts.

effects.name: Shadows/Portfolio mockups/shadow-overlay-right-lg
effects.description: Used for portfolio mockup layouts.

effects.name: Shadows/Portfolio mockups/shadow-overlay-left-lg
effects.description: Used for portfolio mockup layouts.

effects.name: Shadows/Portfolio mockups/shadow-grid-md
effects.description: Used for portfolio mockup layouts.

effects.name: Focus rings/focus-ring
effects.description: Used for focus states in components. For example toggles and checkboxes.

effects.name: Focus rings/focus-ring-shadow-xs
effects.description: Used for focus states in components that also require a shadow. For example, buttons and tabs.

effects.name: Focus rings/focus-ring-shadow-xs-skeuomorphic
effects.description:
Used for focus states in components that also require a shadow and a subtle skeuomorphic effect. For example, buttons and tabs.

This can be replaced with focus-ring-shadow-xs if you prefer a flat style.

effects.name: Focus rings/focus-ring-shadow-sm
effects.description: Used for focus states in components that also require a shadow. For example, buttons and tabs.

effects.name: Focus rings/focus-ring-error
effects.description: Used for destructive or error focus states in components. For example, destructive button links.

effects.name: Focus rings/focus-ring-error-shadow-xs
effects.description: Used for destructive or error focus states in components that also require a shadow. For example, destructive buttons.

effects.name: Focus rings/focus-ring-error-shadow-xs-skeuomorphic
effects.description:
Used for focus states in destructive or error components that also require a shadow and a subtle skeuomorphic effect. For example, destructive buttons.

This can be replaced with focus-ring-error-shadow-xs if you prefer a flat style.

effects.name: Backdrop blurs/backdrop-blur-sm
effects.description: Backdrop blurs (or background blurs) allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.name: Backdrop blurs/backdrop-blur-md
effects.description: Backdrop blurs (or background blurs) allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.name: Backdrop blurs/backdrop-blur-lg
effects.description: Backdrop blurs (or background blurs) allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.

effects.description: Backdrop blurs (or background blurs) allow you to add depth and realism to designs by positioning elements on a z-axis.
